typography.letter_input: text-3xl sm:text-4xl font-bold uppercase text-center focus:outline-none focus:ring-4 focus:ring-green-500/30

layout_and_spacing.container: max-w-6xl mx-auto px-4 sm:px-6 lg:px-8 py-12 min-h-screen flex flex-col
layout_and_spacing.main_grid: grid grid-cols-1 lg:grid-cols-12 gap-12 lg:gap-24 items-start flex-1 mt-8
layout_and_spacing.right_col: lg:col-span-7 flex flex-col gap-8 bg-white p-6 sm:p-8 rounded-2xl shadow-sm border border-slate-100 min-h-[500px]
layout_and_spacing.hexagon_container: relative w-[300px] h-[300px] sm:w-[340px] sm:h-[340px] mx-auto
layout_and_spacing.circle_base: absolute w-20 h-20 sm:w-24 sm:h-24 rounded-full flex items-center justify-center shadow-sm transition-all duration-200 focus-within:scale-110 focus-within:z-10
layout_and_spacing.results_group_header: flex items-center gap-3 border-b border-slate-100 pb-2

components.button: w-full sm:w-auto px-10 py-4 rounded-full font-bold text-lg bg-[#22c55e] text-white transition-all duration-200 transform hover:-translate-y-1 hover:shadow-[0_8px_20px_rgba(34,197,94,0.3)] active:translate-y-0
components.word_badge: px-4 py-2 rounded-lg text-[15px] font-medium border transition-colors cursor-default
components.word_badge_pangram: bg-green-100 border-green-300 text-green-800 font-bold shadow-sm flex items-center gap-1.5

instructions_to_main_agent: Build a responsive React application using pure HTML+Tailwind for the layout to ensure the creative hexagon styling works precisely.
Do NOT use 'Inter' for headings. Install and use 'Outfit' (headings) and 'Manrope' (body) via standard Google Fonts imports.
Implement the hexagonal layout using the exact classes provided in `layout_and_spacing`. The 7 inputs MUST be absolute positioned circles inside the `hexagon_container`.

The 7 circles should be `<input type='text' maxLength={1}>`. The center circle uses `bg-[#22c55e] text-white` (Primary Green). The outer 6 use `bg-slate-200 text-slate-900`. Force uppercase via CSS `uppercase`.

Create a dictionary processing logic: Fetch/Load the Portuguese dictionary, filter for words >= 4 letters, MUST contain the center letter, and ONLY contain letters from the 7 provided. (You can build a small utility function for this).
Display the results on the right column. Group them by length (e.g., '4 Letras', '5 Letras'). Within each group, display words in the flex-wrap `words_grid`.
Pangram logic: Check if a valid word contains all 7 unique letters. If yes, apply the `word_badge_pangram` classes to highlight it prominently.
Add a subtle CSS background pattern to the main body: `bg-[radial-gradient(#e2e8f0_1px,transparent_1px)] [background-size:16px_16px]` to give it a premium tool vibe.

media.background_pattern: CSS radial gradient applied to body
media.icons: Use lucide-react for any UI adornments (e.g., a sparkle icon for pangrams, or a check icon for the generate button).
